title: Wil Glass
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Wil Glass''' did the cover art for several issues of [[Star Wars: Rebellion (comic series)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']], as well as the art for "[[Marked]]," ''[[Skywalkers]]'', ''[[Run Mace Run]]'', and several other [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] stories.

{{Bio-stub}}
